visual_description: A bald figure in dark robes stands with his back to the camera, looking at a swirling ring of fire. The scene cuts to a close‑up of a young man with round glasses and a brown jacket, who looks down with a focused expression. He then turns and walks into a crowded area where people in dark robes are gathered, including a woman in a school uniform, indicating a tense gathering.
audio_description: The audio is unclear and not clearly audible.
